data.title: Vitalik Buterin Holds Q&A on Tako, Discusses Ethereum’s Long-Term Development and Decentralization
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin discussed Ethereum’s scalability, stating that Layer 1 should support critical transactions while Layer 2 improves efficiency. He noted that Ethereum operates independently of its foundation, reinforcing decentralization. Buterin also addressed the role of sequencers and the need to sustain open participation through ongoing improvements in governance, security, and...
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/vitalik-buterin-holds-qa-on-tako-discusses-ethereums-long-term-development-and-decentralization/

data.title: Musk considers sending all Americans $5,000 checks using DOGE savings
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/musk-doge-considers-sending-americans-5000/
